description_long: This is a large, freestanding induction cooker with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in stainless steel and black. The front features two large oven doors with dark glass windows, each equipped with a horizontal handle for easy opening. Above the ovens, there is a wide cooktop with multiple induction heating zones, and a control panel that includes several round knobs evenly spaced along the front edge. The back of the cooker has a raised backsplash with a central circular emblem or indicator. The sides and rear are plain, metallic, and unadorned, emphasizing its robust, industrial appearance. This appliance is suitable for heavy-duty cooking in urban kitchens, restaurants, or communal cooking spaces.
description: A large, stainless steel and black induction cooker with dual ovens, a wide cooktop, and a row of control knobs on the front. It has a modern, professional look with glass oven doors and a raised backsplash.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large oven doors with glass windows, a row of six control knobs above, and a raised backsplash with a central emblem.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the plain metallic side panel and the depth of the cooktop, with the oven handles and control knobs just visible at the front edge.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, unadorned metallic back with the raised backsplash running along the top edge.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the plain metallic side and the depth of the appliance, with the front handles and knobs slightly visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of a single row of six evenly spaced round knobs located above the oven doors, with a central circular indicator or emblem on the raised backsplash. No digital displays or touch areas are visible.
